    if cur_dims != (output_width, output_height):
        _MAXINE_SR.output_width = output_width
        _MAXINE_SR.output_height = output_height
        _MAXINE_SR.load()
        _MAXINE_SR_DIMS = (output_width, output_height)

    return _MAXINE_SR
def clear_maxine_sr() -> None:
    """Release the Maxine VideoSuperRes effect to free VRAM.

    The driver calls this between methods when VRAM pressure is a concern
    (e.g. before running higher_proxy, which needs RAUNE at full 4K)."""
    global _MAXINE_SR, _MAXINE_SR_DIMS
    _MAXINE_SR = None
    _MAXINE_SR_DIMS = None
